glow.useWhen: Add a luminous halo or bloom effect to a surface using CSS blur and blend modes.

alternatives.useWhen: Static luminous accent on cards, buttons, or hero elements
Pointer-reactive lighting instead of a static glow

antiPatterns.pattern: multiple Glow components stacked on the same element
antiPatterns.reason: Stacked blur layers compound, hurting performance and washing out the effect
antiPatterns.fix: Combine into one Glow with higher intensity

antiPatterns.pattern: Glow inside a parent with overflow: hidden
antiPatterns.reason: The blur extends beyond element bounds and will be clipped unexpectedly
antiPatterns.fix: Remove overflow: hidden from the parent or restructure the layout

godrays.useWhen: Render volumetric directional light rays using conic-gradient and blur for atmospheric hero sections.

alternatives.useWhen: Directional volumetric rays emanating from a focal point

antiPatterns.reason: Diminishing visual returns with increasing GPU cost; conic-gradient slices pile up
antiPatterns.fix: Stay at or below 16 rays for most use cases

antiPatterns.pattern: GodRays with speed > 0 when prefers-reduced-motion is active
antiPatterns.reason: Animated rays violate reduced-motion preferences
antiPatterns.fix: The component handles this automatically — do not override the internal motion check

beam.useWhen: Render a single animated light streak across a surface using a linear-gradient animation.

alternatives.useWhen: Single sweeping highlight or shimmer line across a card or hero
Multiple rays from a focal point instead of a single streak

antiPatterns.pattern: multiple Beam components at the same angle
antiPatterns.reason: Parallel beams at the same angle are visually redundant and waste GPU resources
antiPatterns.fix: Use different angles or replace with GodRays for a multi-ray effect

chromaticshift.useWhen: Apply a subtle RGB channel-split distortion effect via SVG filter for glitch-inspired aesthetics.

alternatives.useWhen: Glitch-style chromatic split on images, headings, or card surfaces

antiPatterns.reason: The effect becomes distracting and visually noisy rather than subtle
antiPatterns.fix: Keep offset at or below 6px for tasteful use

antiPatterns.reason: Channel splits reduce readability on dense copy
antiPatterns.fix: Limit to headings, images, or decorative surfaces

alternatives.useWhen: Programmatic filter tweaks on cards, images, or backgrounds

antiPatterns.reason: CSS filters compose multiplicatively, causing unexpected compounding; combine all filter props into one Adjust
antiPatterns.fix: Use a single Adjust with all desired props

antiPatterns.reason: Adjust applies a foreground filter — for blurring a background use Glass (backdrop-filter)
antiPatterns.fix: Use Glass for backdrop blur; use Adjust only for brightness/contrast/saturate/hue tweaks

antiPatterns.reason: The group is designed for one primary field with attached accessories, not a form grid
antiPatterns.fix: Use separate groups or a scoped CSS grid wrapper

activity-feed.name: activity-feed
activity-feed.description: Activity/audit log feed using Timeline with avatars, relative timestamps, and action badges.
activity-feed.snippet:
<script>
  import { Card, Timeline, Avatar, Text, Badge } from '@dryui/ui';

  const activities = [
    { user: 'Alice Park', initials: 'AP', action: 'deployed', target: 'v2.4.0 to production', time: '2024-09-15T14:32:00Z', timeLabel: '5 min ago', badge: 'success' },
    { user: 'Carlos Diaz', initials: 'CD', action: 'merged', target: 'PR #217 — Dark mode fixes', time: '2024-09-15T13:10:00Z', timeLabel: '1 hour ago', badge: 'info' },
    { user: 'Priya Nair', initials: 'PN', action: 'commented on', target: 'Issue #84', time: '2024-09-15T11:45:00Z', timeLabel: '3 hours ago', badge: 'gray' },
  ];
</script>

<Card.Root>
  <Card.Header>Activity</Card.Header>
  <Card.Content>
    <Timeline.Root>
      {#each activities as event (event.time)}
        <Timeline.Item>
          <Timeline.Icon>
            <Avatar fallback={event.initials} size="sm" />
          </Timeline.Icon>
          <Timeline.Content>
            <Timeline.Title level={6}>
              {event.user} <Badge variant="soft" color={event.badge}>{event.action}</Badge> {event.target}
            </Timeline.Title>
            <Timeline.Time datetime={event.time}>{event.timeLabel}</Timeline.Time>
          </Timeline.Content>
        </Timeline.Item>
      {/each}
    </Timeline.Root>
  </Card.Content>
</Card.Root>

command-bar.name: command-bar

<script>
  import { CommandPalette, Hotkey } from '@dryui/ui';

  let open = $state(false);

  function handleSelect(value) {
    if (value === 'new') { /* create new */ }
    else if (value === 'search') { /* open search */ }
    open = false;
  }
</script>

<Hotkey keys="mod+k" onpress={() => open = true} />

<CommandPalette.Root bind:open onSelect={handleSelect}>
  <CommandPalette.Input placeholder="Type a command or search..." />
  <CommandPalette.List>

data-table-with-toolbar.name: data-table-with-toolbar
data-table-with-toolbar.description: Data table with toolbar controls, search input, column toggles, and bulk actions.
data-table-with-toolbar.snippet:
<script>
  import { Container, Card, Toolbar, Input, DropdownMenu, DataGrid } from '@dryui/ui';

  let search = $state('');
  let rows = $state([
    { id: '1', name: 'Alice', status: 'Active' },
    { id: '2', name: 'Bob', status: 'Inactive' },
  ]);
</script>

<Container>
  <Card.Root>
    <Card.Header>
      <Toolbar.Root>
        <Input bind:value={search} placeholder="Search..." size="sm" />
        <Toolbar.Separator />
        <DropdownMenu.Root>
          <DropdownMenu.Trigger>
            <Toolbar.Button>Columns</Toolbar.Button>
          </DropdownMenu.Trigger>
          <DropdownMenu.Content>
            <DropdownMenu.Item>Toggle Name</DropdownMenu.Item>
            <DropdownMenu.Item>Toggle Status</DropdownMenu.Item>
          </DropdownMenu.Content>
        </DropdownMenu.Root>
        <Toolbar.Button>Export</Toolbar.Button>
      </Toolbar.Root>
    </Card.Header>
    <Card.Content>
      <DataGrid.Root items={rows}>
        <DataGrid.Table>
          <DataGrid.Header>
            <DataGrid.Column key="name">{#snippet children()}Name{/snippet}</DataGrid.Column>
            <DataGrid.Column key="status">{#snippet children()}Status{/snippet}</DataGrid.Column>
          </DataGrid.Header>
          <DataGrid.Body>
            {#snippet children({ items })}
              {#each items as row}
                <DataGrid.Row rowId={row.id}>
                  <DataGrid.Cell>{row.name}</DataGrid.Cell>
                  <DataGrid.Cell>{row.status}</DataGrid.Cell>
                </DataGrid.Row>
              {/each}
            {/snippet}
          </DataGrid.Body>
        </DataGrid.Table>
        <DataGrid.Pagination />
      </DataGrid.Root>
    </Card.Content>
  </Card.Root>
</Container>
